welcome.title: Welcome to {{roomName}}
welcome.subtitle: Please make yourself comfortable. Our team is honoured to attend to you.
welcome.headcountHelp: Each category is capped at this number for the duration of your session.
welcome.sessionResume: Your session is still active. Return to the menu to continue ordering.

menu.allCategoriesFull: All categories have reached their limit for this session. Please contact reception for more service.

errors.INVALID_ROOM_TOKEN: This room link has expired. Please ask staff for a new one.
errors.TENANT_SUSPENDED: Service temporarily unavailable. We apologise for the inconvenience.
errors.NO_ACTIVE_SESSION: Your session has expired. Please reload.
errors.ROOM_ALREADY_OCCUPIED: A session is already active for this room.
errors.INVALID_HEADCOUNT: Please choose a valid headcount between 1 and 10.
errors.ITEM_LIMIT_REACHED: You have reached the limit for this item.
errors.ITEM_TAKEN: This item has already been ordered.
errors.CATEGORY_FULL: This category is fully ordered for your party size.
errors.CONCURRENT_USAGE_CONFLICT: Another order is being processed. Please try again.
errors.INVALID_QTY_FOR_ONE_OFF: This item can only be selected once.
errors.NETWORK: Cannot reach the service. Please try again.

confirmation.title: Order Placed
confirmation.subtitle: Our team will attend to you shortly.

wifi.title: WIFI ACCESS
wifi.helpText: Open your phone camera and point it at the QR code below.
wifi.error: Could not load WiFi QR code.
